title: Create_at info for boards
excerpt:
Hi 
I wonder how can i get to know the create_at date of a board cuz it’s not in the board response schema and i’ve been trying to get around that by updates created_at property but with no luck 
Appreciate your help, 
T…

posts.author: yousif (hmada)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I wonder how can i get to know the create_at date of a board cuz it’s not in the board response schema and i’ve been trying to get around that by updates created_at property but with no luck

Appreciate your help,

Thanks,
Youssef

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @yousif,
unfortunately this option is indeed not available with the board schema.
I’ve added this to our requests log.
